title: Live kind deploy of uds-mesh @ uds-v0.2.0
thesis: The five-link attestation chain records source-tree-merkle, zarf-tarballs, pointer-manifest, cosign-signing, and deploy commitments.
script: Deploy the szl-mesh UDS bundle at uds-v0.2.0. The pointer manifest names four component releases at tag-pinned SHAs and four cosigned tarball hashes. Watch the four cross-component SHAs land in manifest order; one cosign verify-blob closes the loop.
expected_output: Four SHAs land in declared order; cosign verify-blob OK.
fallback: Replay the recorded deploy log from a prior run; show extended-attestations.jsonl entries 1-5.
